name: Durbin Street Golf
about: Durbin Street Golf is a locally owned and operated golf supply shop and simulator venue in Casper, Wyoming. Established in 2001, it serves as a one-stop shop for all golfing needs, featuring a fully stocked pro-shop with a complete line of equipment, merchandise, and accessories to fit various skill levels and budgets. The venue offers indoor golf simulators, golf lessons, club fitting, and repair services. It is positioned as a premier destination for golfers looking to improve their game, access new equipment, or practice in an indoor setting.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art golf simulators with full ball flight, launch angle, and backspin tracking
Professional club fitting and repair services for customizing equipment
Variety of leagues and lessons available for all skill levels
One-stop shop for golf equipment, apparel, and accessories
Local, community-focused atmosphere with top-notch service

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service available on-site
No mention of alcohol service or BYOB policy

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Durbin Street Golf provides clubs to suit your playing level, and also offers demo clubs for use.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink service on-site, so it's unclear if outside food and drinks are permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the time required to complete 18 holes on the simulators.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The website does not specifically mention if the venue is kid-friendly or has offerings for juniors.
